struct Config {
    max_retries: u32,
    timeout_ms: u64,
    batch_size: usize,
}

impl Config {
    // GOOD: env parsed once at startup
    fn from_env() -> Self {
        let max_retries = std::env::var("MAX_RETRIES")
            .unwrap_or_else(|_| "3".into())
            .parse()
            .unwrap_or(3);

        let timeout_ms = std::env::var("TIMEOUT_MS")
            .unwrap_or_else(|_| "5000".into())
            .parse()
            .unwrap_or(5000);

        let batch_size = std::env::var("BATCH_SIZE")
            .unwrap_or_else(|_| "100".into())
            .parse()
            .unwrap_or(100);

        Self { max_retries, timeout_ms, batch_size }
    }
}

fn process_request(request: &Request, config: &Config) -> Response {
    for batch in request.items.chunks(config.batch_size) {
        for _ in 0..config.max_retries {
            if process_batch(batch, config.timeout_ms).is_ok() {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    Response::ok()
}
